member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.CommentController
member.summary: Comments API for JellyTube video pages. Posting runs through the content filter automatically — no separate filter call needed.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.CommentController.GetComments(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns all visible comments for a video, newest first (pinned comment always first). GET /JellyTube/Comments/{itemId}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.CommentController.PostComment(System.Guid,Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.PostCommentRequest)
member.summary: Posts a new comment. Runs through moderation automatically. POST /JellyTube/Comments/{itemId}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.CommentController.DeleteComment(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a comment. Authors can delete their own; admins can delete any. DELETE /JellyTube/Comments/{itemId}/{commentId}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.CommentController.PinComment(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Pins a comment (admin only). Unpins any previously pinned comment.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.CommentController.LikeComment(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Adds a like to a comment.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.HypeController
member.summary: API controller for the JellyTube Hype (like) system.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.HypeController.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.HypeController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.HypeController.GetStatus(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets the hype count and the current user's hype state for an item. GET /JellyTube/Hype/{itemId}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.HypeController.Toggle(System.Guid)
member.summary: Toggles the hype state (hype/un-hype) for the requesting user on an item. POST /JellyTube/Hype/{itemId}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.HypeController.GetBatch(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.Guid})
member.summary: Returns hype counts for a batch of items. POST /JellyTube/Hype/Batch Body: array of item GUIDs

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ImageController
member.summary: Extended image upload/serve endpoints for creator accounts. Supports high-res profile pictures, channel banners, and video thumbnails — all with configurable size limits larger than Jellyfin's defaults.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ImageController.UploadBanner(System.Guid)
member.summary: Upload a channel banner image (creator/admin only). POST /JellyTube/Images/{userId}/Banner Body: raw image bytes. Content-Type must be image/*. Header: X-JT-FileSize: {bytes} (optional — used for pre-flight size check).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ImageController.GetBanner(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieve a user's channel banner. GET /JellyTube/Images/{userId}/Banner

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ImageController.DeleteBanner(System.Guid)
member.summary: Delete a user's channel banner (admin only). DELETE /JellyTube/Images/{userId}/Banner

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ImageController.UploadProfilePicture(System.Guid)
member.summary: Upload a high-resolution profile picture (creator/admin only). POST /JellyTube/Images/{userId}/ProfilePicture

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ImageController.GetProfilePicture(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieve a high-res profile picture served by JellyTube. GET /JellyTube/Images/{userId}/ProfilePicture

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ImageController.UploadThumbnail(System.Guid)
member.summary: Upload a high-resolution video thumbnail (creator/admin only). POST /JellyTube/Images/Thumbnail/{itemId}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ImageController.GetThumbnail(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieve a high-res video thumbnail. GET /JellyTube/Images/Thumbnail/{itemId}

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController
member.summary: API controller for the JellySeerr-style media request system.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.GetRequests(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Returns all media requests (admin sees all, users see own).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.SubmitRequest(Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest)
member.summary: Submits a new media request.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.UpdateStatus(System.Guid,Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.RequestStatus,System.String)
member.summary: Updates the status of a request. Admin only.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.DeleteRequest(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a request. Admin only.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.Search(System.String)
member.summary: Searches TMDb for movies and TV shows.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.NowPlaying
member.summary: Returns currently in-theaters (Released) movies.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.Upcoming
member.summary: Returns upcoming (Coming Soon) movies.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.PopularMovies
member.summary: Returns popular movies.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.MediaRequestController.PopularTv
member.summary: Returns popular TV shows.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ModerationController
member.summary: API controller for the JellyTube moderation system. Exposes the content filter, strike management, and account audit endpoints.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ModerationController.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ModerationController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ModerationController.Filter(Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.FilterRequest)
member.summary: Runs a comment or message through the server-side spam and toxicity filter. The web client should call this before submitting any user-generated text. POST /JellyTube/Moderation/Filter

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ModerationController.CanComment
member.summary: Checks whether the authenticated user is allowed to post comments. GET /JellyTube/Moderation/CanComment

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ModerationController.GetAllRecords
member.summary: Returns all tracked user moderation records. GET /JellyTube/Moderation/Users

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ModerationController.GetRecord(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns the moderation record for a specific user. GET /JellyTube/Moderation/Users/{userId}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ModerationController.AddStrike(System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a strike to a user. Admin only. POST /JellyTube/Moderation/Users/{userId}/Strike

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ModerationController.RemoveStrike(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Removes a strike from a user. Admin only. DELETE /JellyTube/Moderation/Users/{userId}/Strike

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ModerationController.ClearReviewFlag(System.Guid)
member.summary: Clears the public review flag on a user account. Admin only. DELETE /JellyTube/Moderation/Users/{userId}/ReviewFlag

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ModerationController.UnlockLogin(System.Guid)
member.summary: Unlocks the login ban on a user account without removing the strike. Admin only. POST /JellyTube/Moderation/Users/{userId}/UnlockLogin

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.SettingsController
member.summary: Returns public-safe JellyTube settings that the web client reads on startup to configure its UI (e.g. whether to show subscriber counts).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.SettingsController.GetPublicSettings
member.summary: Returns client-visible settings — no auth required. GET /JellyTube/Settings

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.StatisticsController
member.summary: API controller for the statistics and analytics dashboard.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.StatisticsController.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Controller.Session.ISessionManager,MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.IUserManager,MediaBrowser.Model.Activity.IActivityManager,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.StatisticsController.GetOverview
member.summary: Returns a high-level overview (active sessions, user count, total events).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.StatisticsController.GetUserStats
member.summary: Returns per-user watch statistics. Admin access only.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.StatisticsController.GetHeatmap
member.summary: Returns a 7-element array (Sun–Sat) of play-event counts.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.StatisticsController.GetLiveSessions
member.summary: Returns all currently active playback sessions.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ThumbnailAbController
member.summary: API controller for the JellyTube A/B thumbnail testing system.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ThumbnailAbController.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ThumbnailAbController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ThumbnailAbController.GetVariants(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns all thumbnail variants and their CTR stats for a video. GET /JellyTube/Thumbnails/{itemId}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ThumbnailAbController.GetNext(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns the next thumbnail variant to display to this viewer (round-robin). The web client calls this when rendering a video card or watch page. GET /JellyTube/Thumbnails/{itemId}/Next

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ThumbnailAbController.RecordClick(System.Guid,System.Guid)
M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ThumbnailAbController.AddVariant(System.Guid,Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.AddVariantRequest)
member.summary: Adds a new thumbnail variant for a video. Creator/admin only. POST /JellyTube/Thumbnails/{itemId}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ThumbnailAbController.RemoveVariant(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Removes a thumbnail variant. Creator/admin only. DELETE /JellyTube/Thumbnails/{itemId}/{variantId}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.ThumbnailAbController.DeclareWinner(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Manually declares a winning variant. Admin only. POST /JellyTube/Thumbnails/{itemId}/Winner/{variantId}

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.TotpController
member.summary: API for Google Authenticator TOTP two-factor authentication. Setup and management require the user to be authenticated (DefaultAuthorization). Verification is called right after Jellyfin login — also requires DefaultAuthorization.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.TotpController.Status
member.summary: Returns whether TOTP is configured and/or enabled for the calling user. GET /JellyTube/TOTP/Status

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.TotpController.Setup
member.summary: Generates a new TOTP secret and returns the otpauth:// URI. The client renders this as a QR code for the user to scan. TOTP is NOT yet enabled — call /Enable after scanning. POST /JellyTube/TOTP/Setup

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.TotpController.Enable(Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.TotpVerifyRequest)
member.summary: Verifies a code from the authenticator app and enables TOTP for the account. Must be called after /Setup — sends the first code to confirm the secret was saved correctly. POST /JellyTube/TOTP/Enable

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.TotpController.Disable
member.summary: Disables TOTP for the calling user's account. POST /JellyTube/TOTP/Disable

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.TotpController.Verify(Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.TotpVerifyRequest)
member.summary: Called by the JellyTube web client immediately after Jellyfin login when the user has TOTP enabled. Stamps the current session as verified for 8 hours on success. POST /JellyTube/TOTP/Verify

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.TotpController.SessionOk
member.summary: Checks whether the current session has already passed TOTP verification. Used by the frontend to decide whether to prompt for a code. GET /JellyTube/TOTP/SessionOk

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController
member.summary: API controller for chunked file uploads.
member.remarks: Upload access requires either: (a) Jellyfin admin role (RequiresElevation), or (b) the user's ID appears in PluginConfiguration.CreatorUserIds.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController.InitSession(Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadRequest)
member.summary: Initializes a new chunked upload session.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController.UploadChunk(System.Guid,System.Int32)
member.summary: Uploads a single chunk for an existing session.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController.CompleteSession(System.Guid)
member.summary: Marks an upload session as complete.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController.CancelSession(System.Guid)
member.summary: Cancels an upload session and removes the temporary file.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController.GetStatus(System.Guid)
member.summary: Gets the current status of an upload session.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.UploadController.GetConfig
member.summary: Returns the current plugin upload configuration.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.VideoMetaController
member.summary: Stores and retrieves JellyTube video metadata (title, description, tags, category, SwipeShow flag, visibility) that Jellyfin's library does not natively support.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.VideoMetaController.GetAll(System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: All public videos, newest first. Pass ?creatorId=… to filter by uploader. GET /JellyTube/VideoMeta

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.VideoMetaController.GetSwipeShow
member.summary: Videos with SwipeShow enabled (used by the SwipeShow page). GET /JellyTube/VideoMeta/SwipeShow

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.VideoMetaController.Get(System.String)
member.summary: Metadata for a single video by JellyTube video ID. GET /JellyTube/VideoMeta/{videoId}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.VideoMetaController.GetByItem(System.Guid)
member.summary: Metadata by Jellyfin library item ID. GET /JellyTube/VideoMeta/ByItem/{jellyfinItemId}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.VideoMetaController.Save(Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.SaveVideoMetaRequest)
member.summary: Saves metadata for an uploaded video. Called by the upload wizard after POST /AIO/Upload/Complete completes successfully. POST /JellyTube/VideoMeta

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.VideoMetaController.Associate(System.String,Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.AssociateJellyfinItemRequest)
member.summary: Associates a JellyTube video ID with a Jellyfin library item ID. Called after triggering a library scan and getting the Jellyfin item ID. POST /JellyTube/VideoMeta/{videoId}/Associate

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.VideoMetaController.Delete(System.String)
member.summary: Deletes video metadata (admin only).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.VpnBlockController
member.summary: Admin API for managing the VPN / IP blacklist. All endpoints require Jellyfin admin (RequiresElevation). The middleware itself runs on every request automatically — no admin action is needed unless you want to manually whitelist or blacklist a specific IP.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.VpnBlockController.GetList
member.summary: Returns the current blacklist and whitelist. GET /JellyTube/VpnBlock/List

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.VpnBlockController.Blacklist(System.String)
member.summary: Manually blacklists an IP. POST /JellyTube/VpnBlock/Blacklist/{ip}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.VpnBlockController.Whitelist(System.String)
member.summary: Whitelists an IP so it is never blocked (even if it matches a VPN range). POST /JellyTube/VpnBlock/Whitelist/{ip}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.VpnBlockController.Remove(System.String)
member.summary: Removes an IP from both the blacklist and whitelist (resets to default VPN-check behaviour). DELETE /JellyTube/VpnBlock/{ip}

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Controllers.VpnBlockController.Check(System.String)
member.summary: Checks whether a specific IP would currently be blocked. GET /JellyTube/VpnBlock/Check/{ip}

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.JellyTubeStartupFilter
member.summary: Injects JellyTube middleware into the ASP.NET Core request pipeline. Registered via so Jellyfin picks it up automatically. Order: VPN block runs first (drops connection before any auth), then registration rate limiter.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Middleware.RegistrationRateLimitMiddleware
member.summary: ASP.NET Core middleware that enforces a registration rate limit. Blocks more than N new account creations per IP within a rolling time window. Default: 5 registrations per IP per 10 minutes.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Middleware.RegistrationRateLimitMiddleware.#ctor(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.RequestDelegate,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Middleware.RegistrationRateLimitMiddleware})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Middleware.RegistrationRateLimitMiddleware.InvokeAsync(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Http.HttpContext)
member.summary: Middleware invocation — intercepts POST /Users/New and enforces the rate limit.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Middleware.VpnBlockMiddleware
member.summary: ASP.NET Core middleware that blocks requests from known VPN providers and auto-blacklists their IPs. Whitelisted IPs always pass through. Controlled by .

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.CommentStore
member.summary: Persisted comment store — keyed by Jellyfin item ID string.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.CommentDto
member.summary: Safe DTO returned to clients — never exposes AuthorId or internal flags.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.HypeStore
member.summary: Persisted store of all hype (like) data across all items.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.HypeStore.ItemHypes
member.summary: Maps itemId → set of userIds who have hyped it.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.HypeStatusResponse
member.summary: Response returned for a single item's hype state for a specific user.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.HypeStatusResponse.ItemId
member.summary: Gets or sets the item ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.HypeStatusResponse.Count
member.summary: Gets or sets total hype count for this item.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.HypeStatusResponse.UserHyped
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the requesting user has hyped this item.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ImageStore
member.summary: Persisted store of extended images (banners, large profile pics).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ImageStore.Banners
member.summary: UserId (string) → banner image record.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ImageRecord.FilePath
member.summary: Absolute server path to the stored image file.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.RequestStatus
member.summary: Represents the status of a media request.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.RequestStatus.Pending
member.summary: Pending admin review.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.RequestStatus.Approved
member.summary: Approved and being sourced.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.RequestStatus.Available
member.summary: Media has been added to the library.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.RequestStatus.Denied
member.summary: Request was denied.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest
member.summary: Represents a single user media request.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.Id
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique request ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.RequestedByUserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin user ID who submitted the request.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.RequestedByUsername
member.summary: Gets or sets the display name of the user who submitted the request.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.TmdbId
member.summary: Gets or sets the TMDb ID (if available).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.ImdbId
member.summary: Gets or sets the IMDB ID (if available).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the title of the requested media.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.Year
member.summary: Gets or sets the year of the media.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.MediaType
member.summary: Gets or sets the media type (movie, tv, etc.).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.PosterUrl
member.summary: Gets or sets the poster image URL.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.Overview
member.summary: Gets or sets a short synopsis/overview.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.Status
member.summary: Gets or sets the current request status.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.AdminNote
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional admin note.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.RequestedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when the request was submitted.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.UpdatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when the status was last updated.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest.UserNote
member.summary: Gets or sets optional user notes.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ModerationStore
member.summary: Persisted moderation store for all users.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ModerationStore.Records
member.summary: Maps userId → their strike record.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UserStrikeRecord
member.summary: Strike record for a single user.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UserStrikeRecord.UserId
member.summary: Gets or sets the Jellyfin user ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UserStrikeRecord.StrikeCount
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of active strikes (0–3).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UserStrikeRecord.CommentBannedUntil
member.summary: Gets or sets when the comment ban expires (null if not banned).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UserStrikeRecord.LoginBanned
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the user is locked out of login.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UserStrikeRecord.FlaggedForReview
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this account is publicly flagged for review.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UserStrikeRecord.PermanentlySuspended
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the account is permanently suspended.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UserStrikeRecord.History
member.summary: Gets or sets the audit trail of strike events.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.StrikeEvent
member.summary: A single entry in the strike audit trail.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.StrikeEvent.Timestamp
member.summary: Gets or sets when the event occurred.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.StrikeEvent.Reason
member.summary: Gets or sets the reason for the strike.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.StrikeEvent.StrikeLevel
member.summary: Gets or sets the strike level after this event.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.StrikeEvent.AddedBy
member.summary: Gets or sets who issued the strike: "system" or "admin".

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.StrikeEvent.AdminNote
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional admin note.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ContentFilterResult
member.summary: Result of the server-side content filter.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ContentFilterResult.Blocked
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the content is blocked.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ContentFilterResult.Reason
member.summary: Gets or sets the reason: "spam", "toxic", or null.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ContentFilterResult.Message
member.summary: Gets or sets the message to show the user (if blocked and toxic).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.FilterRequest
member.summary: Request body for the comment filter endpoint.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.FilterRequest.Text
member.summary: Gets or sets the text to filter.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ThumbnailAbStore
member.summary: Persisted A/B thumbnail store for all items.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ThumbnailAbStore.ItemVariants
member.summary: Maps itemId → list of thumbnail variants.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ThumbnailVariant
member.summary: A single thumbnail variant for A/B testing.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ThumbnailVariant.VariantId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique variant ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ThumbnailVariant.Label
member.summary: Gets or sets the label (e.g. "Variant A", "Variant B").

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ThumbnailVariant.ImagePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the server-side path to the thumbnail image.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ThumbnailVariant.Impressions
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of times this variant was shown to viewers.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ThumbnailVariant.Clicks
member.summary: Gets or sets the number of times viewers clicked through after seeing this variant.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ThumbnailVariant.Ctr
member.summary: Gets the click-through rate as a percentage.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ThumbnailVariant.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when this variant was added.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.ThumbnailVariant.IsWinner
member.summary: Gets or sets whether this variant has been declared the winner.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.AddVariantRequest
member.summary: Request body for adding a new thumbnail variant.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.AddVariantRequest.Label
member.summary: Gets or sets the display label.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.AddVariantRequest.ImagePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the absolute server path to the image file.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.TotpStore
member.summary: Persisted TOTP secrets store (keyed by Jellyfin user ID).

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.TotpRecord
member.summary: Per-user TOTP state.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.TotpRecord.Secret
member.summary: Base32-encoded TOTP secret.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.TotpSetupResponse
member.summary: Returned to the client after calling Setup so they can display the QR code.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.TotpSetupResponse.Secret
member.summary: Base32 secret — shown as text fallback if QR fails.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.TotpSetupResponse.OtpAuthUri
member.summary: otpauth:// URI for Google Authenticator / Authy / etc.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.TotpSetupResponse.Label
member.summary: Friendly account label shown in the authenticator app.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.TotpVerifyRequest.Code
member.summary: 6-digit code from the authenticator app.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession
member.summary: Tracks the state of an in-progress chunked upload.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.SessionId
member.summary: Gets or sets the unique session ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.FileName
member.summary: Gets or sets the original file name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.TotalSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the total file size in bytes.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.ChunkSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the chunk size in bytes used for this session.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.TotalChunks
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of chunks expected.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.ReceivedChunks
member.summary: Gets or sets the set of chunk indexes that have been received.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.BytesWritten
member.summary: Gets or sets the bytes written so far.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.TempFilePath
member.summary: Gets or sets the temporary file path on the server.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.CreatedAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when this session was created.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.LastActivityAt
member.summary: Gets or sets when this session last received data.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.IsComplete
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the upload is complete.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.UploadSession.ProgressPercent
member.summary: Gets the completion percentage.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadRequest
member.summary: DTO for initiating a new upload session.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadRequest.FileName
member.summary: Gets or sets the file name.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadRequest.TotalSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the total file size in bytes.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadResponse
member.summary: Response DTO returned when a session is created.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadResponse.SessionId
member.summary: Gets or sets the session ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadResponse.ChunkSize
member.summary: Gets or sets the chunk size clients should use (bytes).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.InitUploadResponse.TotalChunks
member.summary: Gets or sets the total number of chunks.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.VideoMetaStore
member.summary: Persisted video metadata store. Key = JellyTube video ID (generated at upload-init time = session ID string).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.VideoMeta.VideoId
member.summary: JellyTube video ID — matches the upload session ID.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.VideoMeta.JellyfinItemId
member.summary: Set by admin after Jellyfin library scan associates the file with an item.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.VideoMeta.Visibility
member.summary: public | unlisted | private | scheduled

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.SaveVideoMetaRequest.SessionId
member.summary: The session ID returned by POST /AIO/Upload/Init.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.VpnBlockStore
member.summary: Persisted VPN / IP-blacklist store.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.VpnBlockStore.Entries
member.summary: IP (string) → blacklist entry. Also used for manual whitelist entries.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.VpnBlockEntry
member.summary: A single blacklist or whitelist IP entry.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.VpnBlockListResponse
member.summary: Response returned by the admin list endpoint.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin
member.summary: JellyTube all-in-one plugin. Adds: chunked uploads, statistics, media requests, hype system, A/B thumbnail testing, content moderation, and registration rate limiting.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.Instance
member.summary: Gets the singleton instance of this plugin.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.UploadService
member.summary: Gets the chunked upload service.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.MediaRequestService
member.summary: Gets the media-request service.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.HypeService
member.summary: Gets the Hype (like) service.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.ModerationService
member.summary: Gets the moderation / strike service.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.ThumbnailAbService
member.summary: Gets the A/B thumbnail testing service.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.VpnBlockService
member.summary: Gets the VPN / IP block service.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.TotpService
member.summary: Gets the TOTP two-factor authentication service.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.ImageService
member.summary: Gets the extended creator image service (banners, high-res thumbnails).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.CommentService
member.summary: Gets the comment service.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.VideoMetaService
member.summary: Gets the video metadata service (title, description, tags, SwipeShow flag, etc.).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILoggerFactory)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration
member.summary: Plugin configuration for JellyTube (Jellyfin AIO).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.MediaUploadPath
member.summary: Absolute path on the server where uploaded files are saved.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.MaxUploadSizeMb
member.summary: Maximum allowed upload size in megabytes.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.ChunkSizeMb
member.summary: Chunk size for chunked uploads in megabytes.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.TmdbApiKey
member.summary: TMDb API key for media discovery (legacy — JellyTube doesn't use TMDb by default).

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.RequireRequestApproval
member.summary: Whether the request system requires admin approval.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.PublicStatistics
member.summary: Whether anonymous users can view the statistics dashboard.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.CreatorUserIds
member.summary: Comma-separated list of Jellyfin user IDs that have creator (upload) access. Leave empty to grant upload access to all admins only.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.EnableRegistrationRateLimit
member.summary: Enable registration rate limiting to prevent bot account creation.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.RegistrationRateLimitMax
member.summary: Maximum number of new account registrations per IP per window.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.RegistrationRateLimitWindowMinutes
member.summary: Time window in minutes for the registration rate limit.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.AutoStrikeOnSpam
member.summary: Automatically apply a strike when the spam filter detects spam in a comment.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.ExtraToxicKeywords
member.summary: Extra toxic keywords (comma-separated) loaded at runtime.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.EnableVpnBlock
member.summary: Block requests from known VPN providers and auto-blacklist their IPs.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.VpnWhitelistIps
member.summary: Comma-separated IPs that are always allowed through, even if they match a VPN range.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.VpnCustomCidrBlocks
member.summary: Additional CIDR blocks to treat as VPN (comma-separated, e.g. "1.2.3.0/24,5.6.7.0/22").

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.HideSubscriberCount
member.summary: When true, viewers cannot see the subscriber/user count.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.MaxProfileImageSizeMb
member.summary: Maximum profile picture upload size in MB for creator/admin accounts.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.MaxBannerImageSizeMb
member.summary: Maximum channel banner image size in MB for creator/admin accounts.

member.name: P:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginConfiguration.MaxThumbnailSizeMb
member.summary: Maximum video thumbnail size in MB for creator/admin accounts.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.PluginServiceRegistrator
member.summary: Registers JellyTube services into Jellyfin's DI container at startup. The is picked up by ASP.NET Core's IStartupFilter pipeline, which wires both middleware classes before any request reaches a controller.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.CommentService
member.summary: Stores and retrieves comments per Jellyfin item. Every post runs through ModerationService — spam is auto-struck, toxicity is rejected.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.CommentService.GetComments(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns visible (non-deleted) comments for an item, pinned first.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.CommentService.Post(System.Guid,System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Posts a new comment. Returns null + sets if the content is rejected by the toxicity filter; otherwise returns the saved comment. Spam auto-strikes the author if configured.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.HypeService
member.summary: Manages the JellyTube Hype (like) system. Data is persisted to a JSON file in the Jellyfin data directory so it survives server restarts.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.HypeService.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.HypeService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.HypeService.ToggleHype(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Toggles the hype state for a user on an item. Returns the new hype state for that user.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.HypeService.GetStatus(System.Guid,System.Nullable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Returns the hype count and user state for an item.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.HypeService.GetBatchCounts(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Guid})
member.summary: Returns hype counts for a batch of items.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ImageService
member.summary: Stores and serves extended creator images: channel banners and high-quality thumbnails. Images are written to a subdirectory of the Jellyfin data path.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ImageService.SaveBanner(System.Guid,System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Saves a banner image for the given user, enforcing the configured max size. Returns the response DTO, or throws if the size limit is exceeded.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ImageService.GetBanner(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns (filePath, contentType) for a user's banner, or null if none.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ImageService.SaveProfilePicture(System.Guid,System.IO.Stream,System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Saves a high-res profile picture. Returns the file path so the caller can forward it to Jellyfin's own user-image API if desired.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService
member.summary: Manages media requests and TMDb/IMDb discovery.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with a null logger.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with a provided logger.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.GetAll
member.summary: Returns all requests.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.GetByUser(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns requests for a specific user.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.AddRequest(Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.MediaRequest)
member.summary: Adds a new request.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.UpdateStatus(System.Guid,Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Models.RequestStatus,System.String)
member.summary: Updates the status of a request (admin action).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.DeleteRequest(System.Guid)
member.summary: Deletes a request.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.SearchAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Searches TMDb for movies and TV shows.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.GetNowPlayingAsync
member.summary: Gets currently in-theaters movies.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.GetUpcomingAsync
member.summary: Gets upcoming movies.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.GetPopularMoviesAsync
member.summary: Gets popular movies.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.MediaRequestService.GetPopularTvAsync
member.summary: Gets popular TV shows.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ModerationService
member.summary: Server-side moderation engine for JellyTube. Handles the deterministic spam/toxicity filter and the three-strike system. Strictly NON-AI — regex + keyword dictionary only.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ModerationService.ToxicInterceptMessage
member.summary: The exact intercept message shown to users who post toxic content. Wording is fixed per spec.

member.name: F:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ModerationService.FlaggedAccountNotice
member.summary: The exact public/internal notice shown on Strike-2 flagged accounts.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ModerationService.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ModerationService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ModerationService.Filter(System.String)
member.summary: Runs the text through the spam and toxicity filters. Returns a indicating whether to block.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ModerationService.GetRecord(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns the strike record for a user. Creates a clean record if none exists.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ModerationService.GetAllRecords
member.summary: Returns all tracked records for the admin dashboard.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ModerationService.AddStrike(System.Guid,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a strike to a user and applies the corresponding penalty. Strike 1 → 7-day comment ban. Strike 2 → Login ban + public review flag. Strike 3 → Permanent suspension.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ModerationService.RemoveStrike(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Removes one strike from a user and lifts the corresponding restrictions. Requires an admin note.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ModerationService.ClearReviewFlag(System.Guid)
member.summary: Manually clears the review flag (admin action).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ModerationService.UnlockLogin(System.Guid)
member.summary: Manually unlocks a login ban (admin action, does not remove the strike itself).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ModerationService.CanComment(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns true if the user is allowed to post comments.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ModerationService.CanLogin(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns true if the user is allowed to log in.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.StatisticsService
member.summary: Aggregates watch and network statistics from Jellyfin.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.StatisticsService.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Controller.Session.ISessionManager,MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.IUserManager,MediaBrowser.Model.Activity.IActivityManager,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.StatisticsService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.StatisticsService.GetActiveSessions
member.summary: Returns a list of currently active playback sessions.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.StatisticsService.GetUserStatsAsync
member.summary: Returns a summary of all users with their aggregate play-event count. Fetches all user-attributed activity once, then groups in memory.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.StatisticsService.GetWeekdayHeatmapAsync
member.summary: Returns a per-weekday breakdown of play events (index 0 = Sunday).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.StatisticsService.GetOverviewAsync
member.summary: Returns a simple overview object with top-level counters.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ThumbnailAbService
member.summary: Manages A/B thumbnail testing for JellyTube. Rotates variants round-robin to viewers and tracks impressions + clicks to determine a winning thumbnail automatically.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ThumbnailAbService.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ThumbnailAbService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of .

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ThumbnailAbService.GetVariants(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns all variants registered for an item.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ThumbnailAbService.AddVariant(System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Adds a new thumbnail variant for an item. Maximum of 4 variants allowed.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ThumbnailAbService.RemoveVariant(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Removes a specific variant. Cannot remove the winner.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ThumbnailAbService.GetNextVariant(System.Guid)
member.summary: Returns the next variant to show a viewer (round-robin rotation) and increments its impression count. If a winner has been declared, always returns the winner. Returns null if no variants are configured.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ThumbnailAbService.RecordClick(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Records a click-through for a specific variant. Automatically declares a winner when one variant reaches statistical significance (≥100 impressions each and 20% higher CTR).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.ThumbnailAbService.DeclareWinner(System.Guid,System.Guid)
member.summary: Manually declares a winner for a test. Admin action.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.TotpService
member.summary: RFC 6238 TOTP (Google Authenticator compatible) — implemented in pure .NET, no third-party packages required. Secrets are stored per Jellyfin user ID.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.TotpService.BeginSetup(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a new TOTP secret for the user (replaces any existing pending secret) and returns the setup info (secret + otpauth URI) so the client can show a QR code. Does NOT enable TOTP — the user must call after verifying.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.TotpService.Enable(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies a TOTP code and, if correct, marks TOTP as enabled for the user.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.TotpService.VerifySession(System.Guid,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies a TOTP code for a user who is already authenticated via Jellyfin. On success, stamps the session token as TOTP-verified for 8 hours.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.TotpService.IsSessionVerified(System.Guid,System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if TOTP is not required for the user, or if the session token is already verified.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService
member.summary: Manages chunked file upload sessions.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with a null logger.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of with a provided logger.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService.CreateSession(System.String,System.Int64)
member.summary: Creates a new upload session.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService.WriteChunkAsync(System.Guid,System.Int32,System.IO.Stream)
member.summary: Writes a chunk to the session's temp file.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService.CompleteSession(System.Guid)
member.summary: Marks a session as complete.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService.CancelSession(System.Guid)
member.summary: Cancels and cleans up a session.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.UploadService.GetSession(System.Guid)
member.summary: Retrieves a session by ID.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.VideoMetaService
member.summary: Stores rich video metadata (title, description, tags, category, SwipeShow flag, visibility) that Jellyfin's own library does not support. Key = upload session ID (a GUID string) chosen at upload-init time.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.VideoMetaService.GetByJellyfinItem(System.Guid)
member.summary: Finds metadata by the associated Jellyfin item ID (set after library scan).

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.VideoMetaService.GetAll(System.Boolean)
member.summary: All public videos, newest first.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.VideoMetaService.GetSwipeShow
member.summary: Videos with SwipeShow enabled.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.VideoMetaService.GetByCreator(System.Guid)
member.summary: Videos uploaded by a specific creator.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.VpnBlockService
member.summary: Checks incoming IP addresses against known VPN/datacenter CIDR ranges and a persistent manual blacklist/whitelist. Auto-blacklists IPs on first VPN hit.

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.AIO.Services.VpnBlockService.IsBlocked(System.String)
member.summary: Returns true if should be blocked. Whitelisted IPs always pass. Known-VPN IPs are auto-blacklisted on first hit.
